title: Lab Report Comments
description: Synthetic starter comment bank for testing lab-report review workflows.

comments.label: Data recorded clearly
comments.text: The observations are recorded clearly enough to support the conclusion.

comments.label: Data table incomplete
comments.text: Add missing values or labels so the data table can be interpreted.

comments.label: Procedure repeatable
comments.text: The method is described in a way another reader could repeat.

comments.label: Variables need clarity
comments.text: Identify the variables or controls more clearly in the method.

comments.label: Conclusion uses evidence
comments.text: The conclusion connects back to evidence from the investigation.

comments.label: Analysis connection missing
comments.text: Explain how the evidence supports the conclusion.
